# Mishal

> Personal site of Mishal — builder, thinker, operator.
> Essays on technology, systems thinking, and building in public.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mishal.one/) — Links to social profiles and projects
- [Blog](https://mishal.one/blog) — Essays and technical writing

## About

- Mishal is a solo technical operator based in Australia
- Focus areas: AI systems, content infrastructure, autonomous workflows
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/mishalqrius
